# Epoxy Custom Coatings

> Commercial and industrial floor coating contractor on Vancouver Island, British Columbia, Canada.
> Certified PMMA flooring installers on Vancouver Island, trained through Plasti-Chemie North America.
> Tagline: Keep your feet on better ground.

## Business Summary

Epoxy Custom Coatings installs high-performance epoxy, certified PMMA, polyaspartic, and specialty floor coatings for commercial, industrial, and residential clients across Vancouver Island. The company is family-owned and operated by a father-and-son-in-law team with 30 years of flooring industry experience.

## Contact

- Phone: (778) 700-1095
- Email: info@epoxycustomcoatings.com
- Address: 2626 Sunderland Rd, Victoria, BC, Canada
- Website: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com

## Service Area

Victoria, Langford, Saanich, Nanaimo, Duncan, and communities across Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

## Primary Services (Commercial & Industrial Focus)

- Commercial and industrial floor coatings (restaurants, commercial kitchens, retail, parkades, warehouses, manufacturing, food processing, auto shops, healthcare)
- Certified PMMA flooring (ultra-fast cure, extreme cold installation, minimal downtime)
- ESD and static-control coatings (labs, data centers, medical facilities, electronics manufacturing)
- Residential epoxy and polyaspartic coatings (garages, basements, workshops, patios — also available)

## Coating Systems

Epoxy, certified PMMA, polyurethane, metallic epoxy, flake systems, microcement, decorative lime, ESD coatings

## Key Pages

- Home: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/

- Projects: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/projects.html
- Contact: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/contact.html

## Differentiators

- Certified PMMA flooring installation through Plasti-Chemie North America
- Trained and verified through Plasti-Chemie North America
- 30 years of commercial and industrial flooring experience
- 5-star Google rating (12 reviews)
- Family-owned Vancouver Island business
- Premium materials from Plasti-Chemie North America, Arturo, Sherwin-Williams Pro+, and EcoPoxy Pro
- Free estimates available
